title: Project Telos Twenty-Second-Wave Social And Blog Outreach Claims

claims.text: The twenty-second-wave packet expands only Reddit, YouTube, Hacker News, Substack, dev.to, and technical blog outreach and does not include funding or new GitHub work.
claims.falsification: The packet prioritizes grant work, funding submissions, or new GitHub outreach as part of the active wave.

claims.text: The packet includes exact, non-identical comment drafts for 7 Reddit targets, 8 YouTube targets, and 8 social/blog targets with URLs and reasons.
claims.falsification: The packet lacks exact text, destinations, target reasons, or contains duplicated comments.

claims.text: The packet explicitly marks public posting as not completed and requires action-time confirmation before representational communication is posted.
claims.falsification: The packet claims comments were posted or authorizes public posting without exact destination and exact text confirmation.

claims.text: The twenty-second wave contains no Project Telos repository link in target-specific comment text and recommends an initial no-link first run.
claims.falsification: The packet includes a Project Telos repository link in a comment draft or recommends link-heavy posting.

claims.text: The packet records the current browser limitation that the previous Firefox attempt stopped under browser URL policy enforcement and therefore advances preparation and validation rather than public submission.
claims.falsification: The packet claims an authenticated posting path was available or omits the browser limitation.
